items.title: Paths page tab state, header, and content shell
items.scope: frontend — wire path_page_tab_os_ tab state (My Paths / Paths Library), page header (ai_RNbBHYGr), tab bar RG (ai_RNbBHYHB), sibling-panel visibility under bTJDf (ai_RNbBHYHE vs ai_RNbBHYIK), and bTJDf main-content hide when session completion overlay (bTJAB) is active; composes inside SHELL-08 content slot
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: PathsPage content slot renders bTJDf (G - path content) with data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYGq root; page header ai_RNbBHYGr shows paths-page-title (ai_RNbBHYGt) and paths-page-subtitle (ai_RNbBHYGu) with Text_heading_1_ / Text_body_muted_ style refs

AC-2: Tab bar ai_RNbBHYHB lists path_page_tab_os values (bTIsz My Paths, bTItA Paths Library); clicking tab button ai_RNbBHYHD sets path_page_tab_os_ custom state matching Bubble SetCustomState workflow (default my_paths_/bTIsz per ir/inventory.json)
AC-3: When SessionCompletionRoute marks bTJAB visible, bTJDf hides per IR conditional state on bTJDf — grid/resources panels must not render underneath the form

AC-4: path_page_tab_os_ toggles mutual visibility of sibling panels under bTJDf — ai_RNbBHYHE paths-guided-panel (bTJDr, IR is_visible true) when tab is bTIsz/my_paths_ (My Paths); ai_RNbBHYIK paths-resources-panel (bTJDs, IR is_visible false) when tab is bTItA/paths_library (Paths Library); only one panel visible at a time with collapse_when_hidden per ir/slices/bTHDg____root.json
items.layout_notes: Header stack above tab bar; tab RG uses horizontal Button_tab_ cells from path_page_tab_os AllOptionValue. bTJDr/ai_RNbBHYHE (grid) and bTJDs/ai_RNbBHYIK (resources) are mutually exclusive siblings under bTJDf driven by path_page_tab_os_ (IR defaults: grid visible, resources hidden). bTJDf also hides when bTJAB session overlay is visible — not a router unmount of /paths.

items.title: My Paths grid with tier filter and path cards
items.scope: frontend — migrate bTJDr paths-guided-panel (ai_RNbBHYHE) visible only on My Paths tab (PATHS-01 AC-4): tier filter row (ai_RNbBHYHF, DD ai_RNbBHYHb), recommended header (ai_RNbBHYHh), and paths grid RG (ai_RNbBHYHn) fed by FG enrollment list (bTItY via GetElement) with tier_os filtering on enrolled paths; Paths Library tab content is owned by PATHS-04 (bTJDs/ai_RNbBHYIK)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: PathsGridPanel renders ai_RNbBHYHE with data-bubble-id; mounts only when path_page_tab_os_ equals bTIsz (my_paths_) per PATHS-01 AC-4; filter-tier-group ai_RNbBHYHZ and DD ai_RNbBHYHb use ENUM-04 tier_os labels; recommended section ai_RNbBHYHh preserves indicator + title ai_RNbBHYHk hierarchy

AC-2: Grid RG ai_RNbBHYHn cell ai_RNbBHYHo shows path-card-header (badges ai_RNbBHYHr/Ht/Hw), body title ai_RNbBHYHz, footer enrolled-indicator bTIvJ (icon bTIvO, text bTIvP) and view-details btn ai_RNbBHYIJ; progress uses DS-02 ProgressBar (bTIva) + pct text bTIvt

AC-3: Grid RG ai_RNbBHYHn lists enrolled paths from pathenrollment1 via bTItY GetElement parity; tier DD ai_RNbBHYHb filters visible cards by selected ENUM-04 tier_os; enrollment status badges use ENUM-03 path_enrollment_status
items.layout_notes: Responsive grid via ai_RNbBHYLA column state on mobile breakpoint. Path cards are repeating grid cells — preserve badge row, title body, footer CTA stack. Do not embed crisis reusable bTIwu (bTIdW) — deferred to MOD-DRSAM-CRISIS.

items.title: Path detail popup with enrollment actions
items.scope: frontend — migrate path-detail-popup (ai_RNbBHYJO / Popup ai_RNbBHYMU): header badges, steps/disclaimer/progress groups, DS-02 progress bar (bTIuq), and footer enroll/unenroll/upgrade buttons; read-only path fetch plus enroll/unenroll via existing Supabase pathenrollment APIs (no project/ schema edits)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: PathDetailPopup root data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYJO opens from path-view-details btn ai_RNbBHYIJ with custom.path parent data; header ai_RNbBHYJQ shows title ai_RNbBHYJZ, badges row ai_RNbBHYJS, close btn ai_RNbBHYJa

AC-2: Body groups ai_RNbBHYJc render steps label/text (ai_RNbBHYJh/Ji), disclaimer banner ai_RNbBHYJk, progress group ai_RNbBHYJn with DS-02 wrapper bTItq/bTIuq and pct ai_RNbBHYJs plus last-step text ai_RNbBHYJt

AC-3: Footer ai_RNbBHYJu wires path-detail-enroll-btn ai_RNbBHYJw and path-detail-unenroll-btn ai_RNbBHYJv to create/update pathenrollment1 rows; Btn Upgrade Plan bTJHa visible per tier gating stub using ENUM-04 tier_os
items.layout_notes: Modal overlay centered with Group_overlay_; footer button row aligns upgrade vs enroll/unenroll per IR order. Popup data-bound to selected path from grid cell parent data.

items.title: Paths resources tab panel
items.scope: frontend — migrate bTJDs paths-resources-panel (ai_RNbBHYIK): pinned crisis resource cards (ai_RNbBHYIL static groups), resources list intro ai_RNbBHYIr, and resource search RG ai_RNbBHYIu listing custom.resource rows with card layout and view button ai_RNbBHYJN
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: PathsResourcesPanel renders ai_RNbBHYIK (bTJDs) with data-bubble-id; panel mounts only when path_page_tab_os_ equals bTItA (paths_library) per PATHS-01 AC-4 sibling-panel rules (IR base is_visible false on bTJDs)

AC-2: Pinned section ai_RNbBHYIL preserves three crisis-resource groups (ai_RNbBHYIQ, ai_RNbBHYIZ, ai_RNbBHYIi) with icon rows, titles, descriptions, and free-badge groups using IR copy and Group_card_ styling

AC-3: Resource RG ai_RNbBHYIu cell ai_RNbBHYIv shows card title ai_RNbBHYJF, content ai_RNbBHYJG, sensitivity badge ai_RNbBHYJI, disclaimer ai_RNbBHYJM, and resource-view-btn ai_RNbBHYJN opening resource popup
items.layout_notes: Two-column feel: pinned crisis cards grid above scrollable resource search results. Resource cards mirror path card vertical stack — header meta, body text, footer CTA.

items.title: Resource detail popup
items.scope: frontend — migrate resource-detail-popup (ai_RNbBHYJx / Popup ai_RNbBHYMy) bound to custom.resource: header text groups, sensitivity row, disclaimer, external link ai_RNbBHYKU, and primary action button ai_RNbBHYKW
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ResourceDetailPopup data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYJx opens from resource-view-btn ai_RNbBHYJN with parent resource data; header ai_RNbBHYJz and ai_RNbBHYKA preserve title ai_RNbBHYKC and subtitle texts ai_RNbBHYKE/ai_RNbBHYKG
AC-2: Body groups ai_RNbBHYKL render resource-card-content ai_RNbBHYKR, sensitivity badge ai_RNbBHYKS/ai_RNbBHYKT, and disclaimer note ai_RNbBHYJM copy from IR
AC-3: Footer ai_RNbBHYKV includes link ai_RNbBHYKU and Button_primary_ ai_RNbBHYKW with static label from IR; close control ai_RNbBHYKJ dismisses popup
items.layout_notes: Modal overlay matching path-detail popup shell; link row above full-width primary button. Sensitivity badge uses icon + text inline row from IR.

items.title: Floating enrollment services bar
items.scope: frontend — migrate FG-services (bTItS / FloatingGroup bTItX) with RG PathEnrollment (bTItY) searching pathenrollment1 for CurrentUser; compact enrolled-path strip feeding My Paths grid data source and session-completion visibility condition
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: EnrollmentFloatingBar renders data-bubble-id bTItS with floating layout from FG-services IR (fit_width fluid, not literal 0px)

AC-2: RepeatingGroup bTItY lists current-user pathenrollment1 rows with cell layout from ir/slices/bTHDg____root.json; selecting enrollment updates shared paths store used by ai_RNbBHYHn GetElement binding
AC-3: Store exposes current_session_custom_pathsession per enrollment for PATHS-07 URL session param matching against bTItY list data
items.layout_notes: FloatingGroup anchored per IR (reference top); horizontal repeating enrollment chips/cards. SHELL-08 defers FG mount — this item owns bTItS content only.

items.title: Session completion URL route and DS-04 integration
items.scope: frontend — integrate DS-04 SessionCompletionForm at page mount bTJAG/bTJAB (custom_id bTIyi): show when URL param session matches current_session on an enrollment in bTItY list; wire submit workflow stub (ScheduleAPIEvent bTJCM parity) via read-only Supabase pathsession/pathquestion/pathanswer surfaces — no project/ migrations
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: CustomElement mount bTJAB data-bubble-id renders SessionCompletionForm (DS-04) with pathsession prop resolved from ?session= URL param via GetParamFromUrl parity; hidden until enrollment RG bTItY list current_session contains param id
AC-2: Visible form replaces bTJDf content (PATHS-01 mutual hide); header/session title bindings use parent pathsession fields matching bTIyi IR text nodes bTIxC/bTIxG

AC-3: Submit btn bTIzk triggers frontend stub mirroring bTJBW workflow — plugin placeholders bTJBC/bTJBI inert, ScheduleAPIEvent schedules path-session completion handler, then ChangePage clears session URL param (keep_current_page_params) returning to My Paths grid
items.layout_notes: Session form is full-width overlay inside ai_RNbBHYGq content slot — not a separate route. Reuse DS-04 component verbatim; page item only handles routing, data bind, and submit orchestration.
